subject: An armored warrior in ornate golden Greek-style helm and breastplate, advancing with a glowing double-headed axe
description: A mid-shot action scene of a figure advancing across a golden wheat field. The figure wears a full ornate golden Greek-style helmet with a tall crest and highly detailed engraved patterns throughout, matching the breastplate and armguards. A red draped cloth is slung over one shoulder. The figure holds a large double-headed axe with fiery red-glowing blades that emit dark smoke — clearly visible as the primary weapon. The tunic and kilt are white with gold trim. The background shows a sunlit classical Greek-style building with columns and terracotta roofline, mountain peaks, and two lightly-armored figures in the far background. The gold of the armor and the warm field create a rich ochre-and-crimson palette.
background: classical Greek building with columns, mountain range, sunny sky
